Bash('C:/Program Files/R/R-4.6.0/bin/Rscript.exe' -e 'suppressMessages\(library\(metafor\)\); set.seed\(1\); k<-25; mod<-runif\(k,0,10\); yi<-0.2+0.08*mod+rnorm\(k,0,0.1\); vi<-runif\(k,0.01,0.05\); m<-rma\(yi,vi,mods=~mod,method="REML"\); cat\("beta:",paste\(round\(m$beta,4\),collapse=","\),"| QMp:",round\(m$QMp,4\),"| R2:",round\(m$R2,2\),"| I2res:",round\(m$I2,2\),"\\n"\); cat\("rownames:",paste\(rownames\(m$beta\),collapse=","\),"\\n"\)')

Bash('C:/Program Files/R/R-4.6.0/bin/Rscript.exe' -e 'suppressMessages\(library\(metafor\)\); set.seed\(1\); k<-25; mod<-runif\(k,0,10\); yi<-0.2+0.08*mod+rnorm\(k,0,0.1\); vi<-runif\(k,0.01,0.05\); m<-rma\(yi,vi,mods=~mod,method="REML"\); cat\("BETA",paste\(round\(as.numeric\(m$beta\),4\),collapse=","\),"\\n"\); cat\("ROWNAMES",paste\(rownames\(m$beta\),collapse=","\),"\\n"\); cat\("SE",paste\(round\(m$se,4\),collapse=","\),"\\n"\); cat\("PVAL",paste\(round\(m$pval,4\),collapse=","\),"\\n"\); cat\("QM",round\(m$QM,4\),"QMp",round\(m$QMp,5\),"\\n"\); cat\("R2",round\(m$R2,2\),"I2res",round\(m$I2,2\),"tau2",round\(m$tau2,4\),"\\n"\)')
